title: MicroSD 1 Hz Time-Series Data Logger
design_question: How to store 1 year of 1-second data locally without network dependency?
selected_approach: SPI microSD (32 GB) logs raw CSV at 1 Hz → ≈2 GB/year. Summary (1-min averages) published to MQTT. NTP timestamps.
rationale: MicroSD gives local storage independent of network. 1-min MQTT messages ≈52 MB/year—manageable bandwidth.
verification_notes: FACT: 'NTP Time Synchronisation' confirms <50 ms accuracy for energy audit timestamps.
supporting_fact_titles: NTP Time Synchronisation for Data Logging
